name: 赵钧毅
headline: 个人主页
schoolEn: China University of Mining and Technology-Beijing
bio: 我是赵钧毅，是中国矿业大学（北京）的建筑学大四在读学生，我广泛学习建筑和城市规划领域相关前沿技术。我擅长参数化设计，AI for city以及性能模拟等相关技术，从事过机器学习，深度学习相关技术项目，主持过相关落地项目，具有多学科交叉的项目经验 ，也掌握多软件协同工作流。我的研究兴趣包括：机器学习与深度学习在城市方向的应用，参数化设计与智能建造。本人为27FALL，目前正在寻求研究生（master or phd）学习机会，如您感兴趣，欢迎沟通交流！
bioEn: I am Junyi Zhao, a fourth-year architecture student at China University of Mining and Technology-Beijing. I have been actively exploring frontier technologies across architecture and urban planning, with strengths in parametric design, AI for cities, and performance simulation. My project experience includes machine learning and deep learning workflows, implemented design and construction projects, interdisciplinary collaboration, and multi-software pipelines. My research interests include applications of machine learning and deep learning in urban studies, parametric design, and intelligent construction. I am applying for 2027 Fall master’s or PhD opportunities. If my profile is of interest, I would be glad to connect.
